markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between Finder and GrowthX for AI-powered content creation and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers an AI-powered content platform with expert strategy and execution services](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Pricing ranges from $15-25k/month for execution phase after initial $20k 8-week strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Jeremy is weighing GrowthX vs. in-house development vs. other options like AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Key concerns: long-term costs, platform access post-engagement, time zone logistics](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Platform Capabilities

  - [AI coding agent creates customizable content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Fact-checking, internal linking, image generation integrated](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [Managed by expert editors to ensure quality](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
  - [Dashboard and analytics forthcoming, with plans for client access](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)

### GrowthX Team Expertise

  - [Leadership includes former executives from TechCrunch, TripAdvisor, Shopify](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Mix of CMO/growth, SEO, editorial, and technical expertise](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [VC funding enables high-caliber team not feasible for typical agency](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)

### Engagement Structure

  - [8-week strategy sprint ($20k) to define roadmap and test fit](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
  - [Execution phase typically 12 months at $15k+/month](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=2210.0)
  - [Outputs during sprint: strategy artifacts, 10+ published articles](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Full execution: 15+ editorial pieces/week, 100+ programmatic pages](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)

### Jeremy's Considerations

  - [Attracted to unpublished expertise/"secret sauce" beyond just the platform](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [Concerned about long-term costs and lack of retained agency relationships](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
  - [Interested in potential for platform access post-engagement](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
  - [Weighing opportunity cost vs. in-house development](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)

### Pricing and Flexibility

  - [Strategy sprint: $20k for 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=2526.0)
  - [Execution: $15-25k/month, based on output volume](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=2529.0)
  - [Kyle open to discussing 6-month initial term vs. 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=2244.0)
  - No current offering for platform-only access post-engagement

## Next Steps

  - [Jeremy to regroup with internal stakeholders](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=2730.0)
  - [Decision to be made by next week](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=2739.0)
  - [Kyle available for follow-up questions](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=2744.0)
  - [Potential July start date if moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/xQrJ9Cc7n6hxmRoP75sCnnEjeRXtUKJf?tab=summary&timestamp=2744.0)
